aries:
♈ Aries

🔥 Energy: High but slightly scattered

💼 Career: Multiple tasks aa sakte hain, prioritization zaruri hai

❤️ Love: Jaldi react karne se tension ho sakta hai

💰 Money: Impulsive spending avoid karo

🧘 Advice: Slow down karke plan karo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Speed bina direction waste hai
taurus:
♉ Taurus

🔥 Energy: Grounded aur secure

💼 Career: Stable progress tumhe confidence dega

❤️ Love: Comfort aur trust strong rahega

💰 Money: Financial clarity improve hogi

🧘 Advice: Thoda flexible raho

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Change ko resist karna growth ko slow karta hai
gemini:
♊ Gemini

🔥 Energy: Social aur active

💼 Career: Communication se ek opportunity mil sakti hai

❤️ Love: Light-hearted vibe relation ko fresh karegi

💰 Money: Side gain possible

🧘 Advice: Focus maintain karo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Distraction tumhari biggest enemy hai
cancer:
♋ Cancer

🔥 Energy: Emotional aur intuitive

💼 Career: Inner clarity se better decision loge

❤️ Love: Deep talk relation ko heal karegi

💰 Money: Safe planning zaruri hai

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Jo feel karte ho, wahi guide karta hai
